AddRouteRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddRouteRule.csnRtId: The ID of the CSN route table
AddRouteRule.attachId: The ID of the network instance identity in the CSN
AddRouteRule.destAddress: Destination address of the route. Currently only 0.0.0.0/0 is supported
AddRouteRule.routeType: Route type. Currently only custom is supported
